---
title: Effective Isentropic Diffusivity of Tropospheric Transport
pagetitle: 2014-9-1-Chen2014 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2014
author: Gang Chen and R. Alan Plumb
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 71, 3499--3520, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-13-0333.1.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen and R. Alan Plumb, 2014: Effective Isentropic Diffusivity
  of Tropospheric Transport, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 71, 3499--3520,
  doi:10.1175/JAS-D-13-0333.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-13-0333.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Effective Isentropic Diffusivity of Tropospheric Transport

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2014*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen and R. Alan Plumb, 2014: Effective Isentropic Diffusivity of Tropospheric Transport, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 71, 3499--3520, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-13-0333.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-13-0333.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
